hero.lead:
Automated drone-POV flythroughs over Japan's Ministry of Land PLATEAU 3D city model.
Pick two points, fly through the buildings along the route. After Stop, explore the city freely with your mouse.

section01.title: Fly in 3 steps
section01.step1Title: Pick Point A and Point B
section01.step1Body: Three ways to set A/B: tap the map, search by place name (Tokyo 23 wards), or pick a sample route — straight-line distance ≤ 1.5 km. After A→B, tap the map to add up to 8 waypoints.
section01.step2Body: Google Routes API returns a real driveable or walkable path. The backend crops the surrounding 3D tiles. Switchable between driving and walking.
section01.step3Title: Play for auto-flight → Stop for free exploration
section01.step3Body: Hover above Point A for 3 s → take off → follow route at 80 km/h → land. Lookahead + exponential moving average smooths polyline bends into a jitter-free drone POV. After Stop or route completion, camera control returns to the mouse — orbit any building one by one (see FREE LOOK below).

section02.title: Built to fly. No knobs required.
section02.sub: Key parameters are fixed by design — so you never spiral into a settings rabbit hole.
section02.feat1Body: Flight time scales with distance — long routes take longer, short routes finish fast. No speed adjustment needed every time.
section02.feat2Body: 3 s lift-off → route follow → 3 s landing. setView overrides every frame; heading uses 30 m lookahead × τ=0.4 s EMA to smooth micro-bends.
section02.feat3Body: Marunouchi / Shibuya / Shinjuku / Skytree / Omotesando. Hit a preset when in doubt. The contrast between neighborhoods is immediate.

section02_5.title: More ways to fly
section02_5.sub: Place search, waypoints, shareable presets, and a community board — every detail you need to play beyond a single route.
section02_5.feat1Body: Type a landmark, address, or station — Google Places Autocomplete (Tokyo 23 wards only) returns suggestions you can pin to A, B, or a waypoint with one tap. Works for visitors who can't type Japanese.
section02_5.feat2Body: After A→B, tap the map to add waypoints (C1 — C8). Reorder by drag, remove with ×. Google Routes API recomputes the path the moment you commit.
section02_5.feat3Body: A/B, waypoints, mode, LOD, and the four camera dials are packed into one URL. The receiver opens the link and presses Play — the exact same shot. JSON export and paste-import included.
section02_5.feat4Body: The COMMUNITY section below lists user-shared presets. Anonymous-friendly, no signup. Tap any card to launch it right back into this app.

section03.title: Fine-tune the feel with 4 dials
section03.sub: Presets get you airborne instantly, but four parameters stay live during flight. If it feels mechanical or the camera swings on curves, nudge one value and see the difference.
section03.altBody: Eye height above ground. Low gives a street-level walk; high gives an aerial overview.
section03.pitchBody: Camera depression angle. Negative looks down; positive looks up. Around -10° is the standard cruising attitude.
section03.lookaheadBody: How far ahead (in meters) the drone looks to determine heading. Too small — jittery on tight bends; larger — smoother and more gradual.
section03.tauBody: Shared time constant for heading response and route-line smoothing. Smaller = snappier and straighter; larger = smoother and more curved. 0 disables both.
section03.tip: Start with Lookahead 50 m, Damping 0.5 s. To turn earlier, increase Lookahead. For a snappier response, lower Damping.

section04.title: After Stop — explore the city on your own
section04.sub: The moment auto-flight ends or you hit Stop, camera control returns to your mouse. Lock is released — orbit any building, compose any angle.
section04.orbitBody: Left-click and drag to orbit the camera around the route and buildings. Sweep directions; circle the entire cityscape.
section04.zoomBody: Scroll to move the camera forward or back — zoom in on a single building or pull out for a bird's-eye view. Right-drag up/down works the same way.
section04.tiltBody: Hold Ctrl and right-drag to tilt the pitch angle. Drag up to look skyward; drag down for a straight-down overhead view. Look up at a building from below, lock in a 30° composition, or craft your own drone-photo angle. This is the most fun part.
section04.tip: Press Play again to return to auto-flight with the same settings. The cycle — fly → Stop → compose your angle → Play again — transforms the same route every time.

section05.title: Built with
section05.sub: Python backend, WebGL frontend, Cloud Run infrastructure. Keyless CI/CD deployment.

crossLink.heading: Great flight. Now hover and look closer.
crossLink.body: Want to inspect individual buildings instead of flying a route? Plateau 3D App has you covered. Every building in Tokyo's 23 wards rendered in LOD2 — click any one to read its attributes.

viewer.title: plateau-route-3d
viewer.resetTitle: Clear A/B and route, return to Tokyo Station
viewer.clearAbTitle: Clear A/B, waypoints, and route (keep map view)
viewer.waypointHint: After A/B is set, click the map to add waypoints (max 8, within 1.5 km of both A and B)
viewer.lodHint: Changes take effect on the next Fetch Route → Play.
viewer.errorAbBothRequired: Please set both Point A and Point B
viewer.camLookaheadTitle: How far ahead the drone looks to decide heading. Larger values smooth tight bends.
viewer.camTauTitle: Time constant for heading response. Larger = smoother and more gradual; smaller = snappier.

search.hint: Search by place name, address, or landmark (Tokyo 23 wards only)
search.outOfRange: This query is outside the Tokyo 23 wards coverage. Please try a place inside the 23 wards.
search.noMatch: No matching place found. Try a different keyword.
search.errorAutocomplete: Search failed. Please try again in a moment.
search.errorOutOfRange: This place is outside the Tokyo 23 wards coverage.
search.errorAbTooFar: Too far from A. Please pick a place within 1.5 km.
search.errorWpTooFar: Too far from A or B. Place must be within 1.5 km of both.

share.pastePlaceholder: Paste a URL or JSON here
share.appliedSuccess: Preset loaded — press Play to start

board.sectionSub: Try presets shared by others. Grab a preset URL from the [Share] button in Viewer and post it here.
board.errorRateLimit: Too many posts. Please wait a moment.

playBanner.title: Try a drone-view route
playBanner.lead: ▼ Read the free-look notes below, then launch the viewer. The default route runs out of the box.

boardBanner.title: Community Presets
